sections.paragraph:
verb לעגון

to anchor, moor

verb לעגן

to anchor, guy, moor; fix; base; desert (without divorcing)

verb עוגן

be anchored; fixed; based; be deserted (without divorcing)

verb להתעגן

be deserted (without divorcing)

verb להעגין

to anchor

verb לעגן (>>עיגן)

to anchor, guy, moor; fix; base
